step_1.subject: Quick thought on AcmeSaaS's UPI expansion
step_1.body:
Priya,

Noticed AcmeSaaS just closed your Series A — congrats. Scaling a payments team post-funding is a different beast entirely.

We helped a similar fintech (50-person, Series A) cut their outreach setup from 6 hours to 20 minutes while keeping deliverability above 95%.

Curious — how are you currently handling outbound to potential partners?

step_2.subject: Re: AcmeSaaS outreach
step_2.body:
Priya,

Following up briefly. I came across a case study where a fintech similar to AcmeSaaS reduced email bounce rates by 40% by switching from manual sequences to AI-timed sends.

The key insight was sending during each recipient's peak engagement window — not just business hours.

Happy to share the full breakdown if useful.

step_3.subject: Re: One last note
step_3.body:
Priya,

I know your inbox is busy — this is my last note.

If outbound outreach is on your radar for Q2, I'd love 15 minutes to share what's working for fintechs like yours.

If not, totally understand. Either way — [CALENDAR_LINK]

Cheers,
Ravi

step_1.subject: Razorpay's growth and a quick question
step_1.body:
Rahul,

Saw the Series F news — $160M is no joke. When you're scaling that fast, outbound partnerships become a pipeline challenge, not just a sales one.

Curious how your team handles multi-step outreach to potential integration partners right now.

step_2.subject: Re: Partnership outreach at Razorpay
step_2.body:
Rahul,

Quick follow-up. One pattern we've seen with payments companies at your scale: the teams that automate their outreach sequences (with human-like timing) book 3x more partner calls than those doing it manually.

We built a tool that does exactly this. Worth a look?

step_3.subject: Re: Last note from me
step_3.body:
Rahul,

Last message from me. If automating outreach is something Razorpay's partnerships team is thinking about, I'd love a quick chat.

If the timing isn't right, no worries at all. [CALENDAR_LINK]

step_1.subject: Zepto's 100-city expansion
step_1.body:
Ananya,

Read about Zepto expanding dark stores to 100 cities by Q2. That kind of growth means your team is juggling vendor partnerships at scale.

Curious — are you automating any of your outreach to new supply chain partners, or is it still mostly manual?

step_2.subject: Re: Supply chain outreach
step_2.body:
Ananya,

Following up quickly. We recently helped a logistics startup automate their partner outreach — they went from 10 manual emails/day to 50 AI-personalized ones with zero spam flags.

The secret was behavioral timing — sending when each recipient is most likely to engage.

Happy to share details if relevant.

step_3.subject: Re: Final note
step_3.body:
Ananya,

Just a quick final note. If scaling outreach is on Zepto's roadmap, I'd love 15 minutes to show what's possible.

Totally fine if now isn't the right time. [CALENDAR_LINK]
